saturate 0.1.0

Time-series of code usage driven by a document-level date attribute

Source: R/analytics.R
qc_temporal_analysis.Rd

Groups codings by a calendar period (year, month, ISO week, or day) using a named source_attributes variable as the date axis.

Usage

qc_temporal_analysis(
  project,
  date_attr = "doc_date",
  period = c("year", "month", "week", "day"),
  code_ids = NULL,
  source_ids = NULL,
  coder = NULL
)

Arguments

project

A qc_project object.

date_attr

Character. The source_attributes.variable that stores ISO-8601 date strings for each document.

period

One of "year", "month" (default), "week", or "day".

code_ids

Integer vector or NULL. Restrict to these codes.

source_ids

Integer vector or NULL. Restrict to these documents.

coder

Character or NULL. Restrict to codings by this coder.

Value

A tibble: period, code_id, code_name, n_codings, n_documents. Sorted by period then code name.
